stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Concerning the viscosity classification of aviation lubricating oils, which of the following statements is accurate?

options.b: Multi-grade oil 5W-50 behaves like SAE 5 at high temperature.
options.c: SAE 120 has higher viscosity than SAE 100 and SAE 80.
options.d: Multi-grade oils do not change viscosity with temperature.
